purpose_context: Mission artifacts are split across a coordination branch (lifecycle/bookkeeping: status, notes, trace, issue-matrix, move-task) and the primary branch (stable planning: spec, plan, WP outlines), while no-coordination missions keep everything on primary. Today that placement logic is duplicated and sometimes bypassed, producing create-time split-brain and misleading coordination errors. This mission routes every read and write through a single topology-aware resolver seam - even when the answer is 'primary' - and locks the behaviour with an end-to-end regression test, so future work cannot reintroduce the split.
purpose_tldr: Make one topology-aware API the single place that decides where every mission artifact is stored and read, and lock it against regression.
